response.overview: Everyone has a Rishi - someone who becomes an inseparable part of their life. Yet, death is inevitable. For Zoya, Rishi wasn't just a best friend; he was a part of her soul. "Rishi" delves into Zoya's inner world as she reflects on how deeply he shaped her life - and how his passing left her surrounded by loneliness and emptiness. When she finally opens her heart to her friend Anlisa, Zoya begins to find closure - learning to let go, to thank Rishi, and, at last, to say goodbye.
response.title: Rishi
